title: Command `manifest inspect` wants to mount stuff
body:
### Issue Description

I have installed `podman` inside a container. I am aware that I can only run containers with special privileges set etc.
However `docker manifest inspect alpine:latest` works without having to mount anything.
Podman tries to do some startup probably which is too much for the command `manifest inspect`.

Run `podman manifest inspect alpine:latest` returns
